primary_sources.name: CMS ESRD Quality Incentive Program
primary_sources.relevance: Defines QIP measures, scoring methodology, and payment adjustments for dialysis facilities

primary_sources.name: Merit-based Incentive Payment System (MIPS) Overview
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes MIPS reporting requirements and quality measures for nephrology clinicians

primary_sources.name: Dialysis Facility Reports (DFR)
primary_sources.relevance: Provides standardized quality and safety data for ESRD facilities with benchmarking capabilities

primary_sources.name: USRDS Annual Data Report
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive national data on ESRD outcomes, costs, and quality metrics for benchmarking

secondary_sources.name: Healthcare Financial Management Association (HFMA) Revenue Cycle Resources
secondary_sources.relevance: Best practices for financial KPIs including days in A/R and net collection rates

gaps: Limited recent literature on nephrology-specific financial benchmarking standards
Lack of standardized industry benchmarks for dialysis facility financial performance metrics
